shortDescription: Convert Markdown documents into DOCX format and save them directly to the user's OneDrive. Ideal for turning research outputs and reports into shareable Word documents.

linkConfig.description: Sign in to grant HelkinSwarm access to save documents to your OneDrive

orchestratorUseCases: convert a Markdown report or research output into a Word (.docx) document saved to the user's OneDrive
export a draft or meeting notes from Markdown to Word format for sharing
produce a polished Word document from a Markdown-formatted research deliverable
save a formatted document to OneDrive HelkinSwarm folder for download

tools.name: docformat_to_docx
tools.description: Converts Markdown text to a Word (.docx) document and saves it to the user's OneDrive under a HelkinSwarm folder. Supports headings, bold, italic, inline code, code blocks, and unordered/ordered lists. Returns a download link after saving. Requires the user's linked Microsoft account (Files.ReadWrite scope).

markdown.description: The Markdown content to convert (max 200 000 characters)

filename.description: The filename to use, without extension (e.g. 'Q2-Research-Report'). Defaults to 'document'.
